title: Manufacturing Engineer - Microtek International - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Microtek International - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Microtek International in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microtek International:
Microtek International is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
